ItacPersonItem.Notes: Appointed `Avvocato fiscale e consultore di stato ` by the Venetian Republic. In 1603 he was appointed `primario` of canon law at the Paduan studio. Joined the Ricovrati in 1601.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
